sources.notes: Zoho Expense publishes complete REST API docs at https://www.zoho.com/expense/api/v1/ covering 35+ endpoints across 12 resources. No OpenAPI/Swagger published but docs are sufficient to author an internal YAML spec. No anti-bot protection on www.zohoapis.in. No client-rendering. No login wall on docs. Browser-sniff would add no new endpoint information.
